title: Better customization + personalization of homepage
excerpt: We’re testing Monday out and one of my biggest dislikes (hates) is the Homepage.  I hate that I can’t modify it (at least that I know).   I don’t want to see the inbox or recently accessed documents.  I’d rather see work…

posts.author: amillssalvation (Amy Mills)
posts.cookedHtml: We’re testing Monday out and one of my biggest dislikes (hates) is the Homepage. I hate that I can’t modify it (at least that I know). I don’t want to see the inbox or recently accessed documents. I’d rather see workspace first, and the others collapsed until I want to open them. Does Monday plan on making the homepage more customizable?

posts.author: jwassan (Jennifer Wassan)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to be able to personalize what you see on the home page and where and how you see it.

posts.author: Hannah_Albert (Hannah Albert)
posts.cookedHtml: My team is also not a fan of the new homepage. We’d love to be able to customize a homepage like you can for a dashboard. Adding widgets, etc… would be great.

posts.author: Lucas1 (Lucas)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree this is needed. I would like a homepage where you can see the boards that are useful for you. So all your favorite boards, dashboard, workspaces, and documents on one start page.

posts.author: jamiecrippin (Jamie Crippin)
posts.cookedHtml: I used Podio before and completely agree that the worst part about Monday is the homepage. Podio had a GREAT customizable homepage!

posts.author: MattFrost (Matt Frost)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would LOVE to see this!
The closest workaround I could get was using a dashboard and widgets, but it just wasn’t as effective.

posts.author: Cseiler (Colt Seiler)
posts.cookedHtml: This really needs to happen. A large part is that initial screen when logging in as it displays important info tailored to that user immediately after logging in

posts.author: smoore (Sam Moore)
posts.cookedHtml: This is solved to an extent for enterprise customers who can choose any board to be the homepage, I don’t know why it isn’t available to all customers. Seems a simple fix for monday to do.

posts.author: jarodthornton (Jarod Thornton)
posts.cookedHtml: Pleaase, Monday.com, give us control of our home page!

posts.author: Sriram (Sriram Parthasarathy)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed! For non-enterprise customers (which I suspect would be a large group here), it would really be appreciated. Also, the “products by Monday.com” section which I cannot seem to hide/close reverts itself to the very top of the home page. I’m not sure how many people find that helpful, but it would be great if at least it could be dragged down the page for those who would want to see more workflow data instead of product trial opportunites.
